title: clusia gracilis
intro: Clusia gracilis, also known as the 'Yellow Clusia', is a species of flowering plant in the Clusiaceae family, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clusia gracilis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
